title: Selection Tournament for Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships 2026
indian_angle: This tournament determines India's representatives for the Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships, vital for nurturing future talent.
summary: The Badminton Association of India announced the selection tournament for the upcoming Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships 2026.

title: Gambling Capital Where PV Sindhu Took First Steps on Road to Stardom
indian_angle: This feature explores the early career and foundational experiences of Indian badminton icon PV Sindhu.
summary: A feature article delves into PV Sindhu's initial steps towards stardom, highlighting her early experiences in Macau.

title: BAI Advisory Regarding Unauthorized Badminton Premier League Season 2
indian_angle: The BAI issued an advisory against an unauthorized league, emphasizing its role in regulating domestic badminton events in India.
summary: The Badminton Association of India released an advisory cautioning against participation in the 'Passion Sphere presents Badminton Premier League – Season 2' due to its unauthorized status.

title: Yonex-Sunrise All India Senior Ranking Badminton Tournament in Chennai
indian_angle: This circular announces a major domestic senior ranking tournament in Chennai, crucial for Indian players to improve national rankings.
summary: The BAI issued a circular for the Yonex-Sunrise All India Senior Ranking Badminton Tournament 2026, scheduled to be held in Chennai from July 16th to 23rd.

title: Thomas Cup Squad Reassembles for Asian Games; Treesa-Gayatri Return
indian_angle: The Indian squad for the Asian Games, including the return of Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand, is reassembling after the Thomas Cup.
summary: The Indian badminton squad that competed in the Thomas Cup is reassembling for the upcoming Asian Games, with Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand making their return.

title: Expression of Interest for BWF World Championships 2026
indian_angle: India is inviting expressions of interest for the BWF World Championships 2026, indicating a potential major hosting opportunity for the country.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has issued an Expression of Interest (EOI) for the BWF World Championships 2026, signaling India's potential to host the prestigious event.
